title: Error::Wh display is not actionable
description: error.rs Display impl for Error::Wh emits 'wolfHSM error {code}' — a raw integer like -2104. A user seeing this at runtime cannot act on it without grepping wolfHSM headers for WH_ERROR_* constants. The message should either name the symbolic constant (requires a lookup table) or direct the user to wolfhsm/wh_error.h. Minimum fix: append 'see wolfhsm/wh_error.h for symbolic names' to the message so the user knows where to look.
